prediction.whyTheyWin: New York Yankees are projected to win because Boston Red Sox (31-45, 40.8%) have outplayed New York Yankees (46-31, 59.7%) across the full season.; New York Yankees send out Gerrit Cole (3.62 ERA) against Jake Bennett (3.71 ERA).; ESPN's model gives Boston Red Sox a 45.4% chance and New York Yankees a 54.6% chance.

reasons.title: Better season record
reasons.detail: Boston Red Sox (31-45, 40.8%) have outplayed New York Yankees (46-31, 59.7%) across the full season.

reasons.title: Starting pitching edge
reasons.detail: New York Yankees send out Gerrit Cole (3.62 ERA) against Jake Bennett (3.71 ERA).

reasons.title: ESPN Matchup Predictor agrees
reasons.detail: ESPN's model gives Boston Red Sox a 45.4% chance and New York Yankees a 54.6% chance.

reasons.title: Power rating edge
reasons.detail: Composite rating favors New York Yankees: 0.434 vs 0.627 (ESPN + MLB.com + form).

reasons.title: Favorable home/road split
reasons.detail: Boston Red Sox are 12-25 at home while New York Yankees are 24-16 on the road.

reasons.title: Opponent injury issues
reasons.detail: Boston Red Sox missing or limited players: Patrick Sandoval (60-Day-IL), Jovani Moran (15-Day-IL), Romy Gonzalez (60-Day-IL).

reasons.title: Run differential
reasons.detail: Boston Red Sox -8 vs New York Yankees +110 (MLB.com).

reasons.title: Game conditions
reasons.detail: Forecast at Fenway Park: 76°F, 2% precipitation.
